title: ElevenLabs Recognizer Options
description: ElevenLabs-specific STT options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'elevenlabs'.

commitStrategy.description: How audio chunks are committed. 'manual' for explicit commits, 'vad' for voice activity detection.

vadSilenceThresholdSecs.description: Silence duration in seconds to trigger VAD commit.

minSpeechDurationMs.description: Minimum speech duration in milliseconds to accept.

minSilenceDurationMs.description: Minimum silence duration in milliseconds to trigger end of speech.
